title: Delhi HC holds YouTuber guilty of criminal contempt of court over scandalous remarks on judiciary
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday held YouTuber Gulshan Pahuja guilty of criminal contempt of court for making scandalous comments about the judiciary, including baseless allegations of bias against judicial officers, in his videos [Court On Its Own Motion Vs Shiv Narayan Sharma Adv and Ors].The Division Bench of Justice Navin Chawla and Justice Ravinder Dudeja emphasised that allegations against the integrity of a judicial officer cannot be made lightly. “If one has to attack a Judicial Officer o
